rulesStrings.li:
questDescription->A cultivator unknowingly enters a mysterious dreamlike state, and a scene unfurls before his eyes like a scroll.

In the dream, a green orb floats in the dazzling starry sky. An elderly figure with white hair, dressed in simple robes, appears before him, smiling warmly. He takes a jade talisman from his sleeve, and the talisman transforms into spiritual energy, rushing into the cultivator's mind.

When the cultivator regains his senses, a new memory has appeared in his mind, pointing to a location not far away. Clearly, there is something worth seeking there.

questDescription->A cultivator unknowingly enters a mysterious dreamlike state, and a scene unfurls before his eyes like a scroll.

In the dream, the clang of metal and the sound of battle filled the air. A red-haired warrior, with a fierce gaze, stared into the distance. His bare chest gleamed, and in his hand, spiritual energy shaped a massive axe, which he swung toward the far horizon.

When the cultivator regains his senses, a new memory has appeared in his mind, pointing to a location not far away. Clearly, there is something worth seeking there.

questDescription->A cultivator unknowingly enters a mysterious dreamlike state, and a scene unfurls before his eyes like a scroll.

In the dream, countless giant machines rose from the ground, their gears clashing endlessly, while currents of energy flowed like rushing blood. A copper-skinned statue materialized out of thin air. It opened its mouth, spitting out a series of numbers, as if revealing a coordinate.

When the cultivator regains his senses, a new memory has appeared in his mind, pointing to a location not far away. Clearly, there is something worth seeking there.

questDescription->A cultivator unknowingly enters a mysterious dreamlike state, and a scene unfurls before his eyes like a scroll.

In the dream, an androgynous scholar, his face hidden behind a fan, shifted through dozens of different appearances, finally settling into the form of a cultivator. With a seductive smile, he lightly tapped the fan, and an image began to materialize before him.

When the cultivator regains his senses, a new memory has appeared in his mind, pointing to a location not far away. Clearly, there is something worth seeking there.

li.label: The illusion disappears
li.text: The realm of spiritual illusions, after sustaining itself for a time, gradually dissipated on its own.

WorldObjectDef.label: Immortal illusion
WorldObjectDef.description: A place that seems no different from its surroundings, but only cultivators are drawn to the spiritual energy within, entering the illusion.
